creator: sterling@camdensoftware.com
text:
Please remove files/*

Revised patch for bumping version and changing tar format:

diff -u sudoku/Makefile /usr/ports/games/sudoku/Makefile
--- sudoku/Makefile	2011-08-22 20:41:34.000000000 -0700
+++ /usr/ports/games/sudoku/Makefile	2011-08-22 19:55:23.000000000 -0700
@@ -7,15 +7,18 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sudoku
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	http://chipstips.com/download/
-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tbz
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.laurasia.com.au/downloads/
+EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	sterling@camdensoftware.com
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Console based sudoku games
 
+DEPRECATED=	No more public distfiles
+EXPIRATION_DATE=	2011-09-01
+
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/sudoku \
 		share/sudoku/template
 PLIST_DIRS=	share/sudoku
diff -u sudoku/distinfo /usr/ports/games/sudoku/distinfo
--- sudoku/distinfo	2011-08-22 20:43:20.000000000 -0700
+++ /usr/ports/games/sudoku/distinfo	2011-07-03 07:25:02.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (sudoku-1.0.2.tbz) = 8722b3cc329821d6c17da14b62a45b172392177057e643588344666d821663f6
-SIZE (sudoku-1.0.2.tbz) = 31342
+SHA256 (sudoku-1.0.1.tgz) = a067b3fb1ffd4e5bf0fa5bc705d391bafc33ca45d51f5d45db0733cad3da9d0f
+SIZE (sudoku-1.0.1.tgz) = 31576
Common subdirectories: sudoku/files and /usr/ports/games/sudoku/files

--
